# mehowz Archive

> Complete archive of messages from mehowz (mehowbrainz / ZenonOrg) in the Zenon Network Telegram channel (@zenonnetwork).

This site documents toxic, aggressive, and threatening behavior by the Telegram user mehowz (username: mehowbrainz, display name: mehowz | ZenonOrg) in the Zenon Network community Telegram channel.

## Data

- Total messages archived: 2978
- Flagged as toxic/aggressive: 82 groups
- Date range: November 2019 to March 2026
- Source: @zenonnetwork Telegram channel

## Flagging Keywords

Messages are flagged when they contain any of these terms:
idiot, retarded, dumb, pathetic, useless, suck, sucking, kill, fool, clown, garbage, crap, psyops, scam, grift, sham, doxx, doxxed, doxxing

## Structure

All message data is stored in a single JSON file:
- `/posts.json` - Contains all messages grouped by consecutive posts, with reply context, keyword matches, and direct Telegram links

Each message group includes:
- Message ID and date
- Full message content
- Whether the group is flagged (contains toxic keywords)
- Which keywords matched
- Direct link to the original Telegram message
- Reply context (the message being replied to, including author and content)

## Contributing

The archive can be extended via pull requests to the `public/posts.json` file.
See: https://github.com/Crash-Out/mehowz.github.io/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

## Links

- Website: https://crash-out.github.io/mehowz.github.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Crash-Out/mehowz.github.io
- Source channel: https://t.me/zenonnetwork
- Full data: https://crash-out.github.io/mehowz.github.io/posts.json
- LLMs full: https://crash-out.github.io/mehowz.github.io/llms-full.txt
